context: Evaluating the ability to safely refactor a fat Rails controller by extracting logic into a service object while following a strict TDD protocol.

checklist.name: Characterization Tests First
checklist.description: The agent must write RSpec tests for the existing controller behavior BEFORE altering the controller's logic.

checklist.name: Test Coverage
checklist.description: The tests must cover both the happy path (successful order creation) and the failure path (e.g., inventory failure).

checklist.name: Extraction and Delegation
checklist.description: The core business logic must be moved from the controller into a distinct Service Object, leaving a skinny controller that primarily handles HTTP concerns and delegates to the service.

checklist.name: Behavior Preservation
checklist.description: The underlying business logic, responses, and HTTP status codes must remain identical to the original implementation.

checklist.name: Single Responsibility Principle (SRP)
checklist.description: The newly extracted Service Object must adhere to the Single Responsibility Principle.

checklist.name: YARD Documentation
checklist.description: The extracted public methods in the new Service Object must be documented using correct YARD tags.
